applyDialog.noProjects: No canvas projects are available. Create a new project instead.

neonAlley.title: Neon Alley Confrontation
neonAlley.excerpt: A rainy narrow-alley standoff with neon reflections, low camera placement, and sharp contrast.
neonAlley.prompt: A narrow city alley on a rainy night, two characters facing each other on separate depth planes, wet pavement reflecting cyan and magenta neon. Low wide-angle camera, blurred pipes and wall texture in the foreground, characters rim-lit in the middle ground, faint smoke and city signage in the distance. Emphasize tense cinematic composition, clear spatial depth, realistic materials, rich detail without clutter.

characterPortrait.title: Character Continuity Portrait
characterPortrait.excerpt: A reusable character reference with clear clothing materials and recognizable identity traits.
characterPortrait.prompt: A reusable cinematic half-body character portrait with clear facial features, steady eye direction, layered clothing materials, and distinctive hair, accessories, and silhouette. Soft key light from the front-left, subtle rim light separating the subject from a simple photographic background. Keep the character identity consistent, avoid exaggerated deformation, suitable as a reference for later storyboard and multi-angle generation.

wideEstablishing.title: Wide Establishing Shot
wideEstablishing.excerpt: A wide opening or transition shot with readable scale, subject placement, and movement paths.
wideEstablishing.prompt: A wide establishing shot for a storyboard opening, showing full scene scale, main building or terrain boundaries, a small human-scale subject placement, and a clear movement path. Camera slightly above eye level, foreground, midground, and background layers are readable, natural light, suitable as a staging and Director Studio layout reference for follow-up shots.

productHero.title: Product Hero Still
productHero.excerpt: A centered product still with controlled material detail, edge highlights, and background depth.
productHero.prompt: A commercial advertising product hero still, one core product placed slightly below center, crisp edge highlights, realistic material detail, low-key geometric platform and soft gradient light in the background. Key light shapes the product form, fill light preserves layered shadows. Clean, professional, suitable for a poster or ecommerce hero image, no extra text or logos.

actionBeat.title: Action Storyboard Beat
actionBeat.excerpt: A key action beat with direction, speed cues, and readable character relationships.
actionBeat.prompt: A key action storyboard beat: the character moves rapidly from lower-left toward upper-right, body pose showing a clear force direction, clothing and nearby environment with slight motion drag. Foreground obstacles enhance speed, the character action is readable in the midground, background keeps identifiable spatial cues. Strong compositional direction, action logic that can expand into a sequence, and realistic cinematic lens quality.

interiorMorning.title: Interior Morning Ambience
interiorMorning.excerpt: Window light, dust motes, and quiet lived-in details for an emotional interior scene.
interiorMorning.prompt: A quiet morning interior scene, soft daylight entering diagonally through the window, faint dust motes in the air, simple realistic furniture, subtle wall, fabric, and wood textures. Restrained and lived-in, suitable for a character alone or a dialogue setup before action begins. Leave clear space for character movement and avoid excessive decoration.

settings.title: Settings
settings.providerGuideText: Different providers vary in model capability, queue speed, and stability. Switch providers based on your task, and follow each provider's recommended parameters.

customProviderHelp.title: Not sure how to configure it?
customProviderHelp.step1: Click "Copy tutorial prompt" on the left, then paste it into the AI assistant you usually use.
customProviderHelp.step2: Send the provider API docs or curl example to the assistant and ask it to output JSON in the required format.
customProviderHelp.step3: Paste the returned JSON into "One-click JSON import", import it, let the form fill itself, then add the API key and save.
customProviderHelp.step4: If the API needs signing, multipart/form-data, x-www-form-urlencoded, or task polling, ask the assistant to call that out in note and prefer direct form mode, a proxy, or a later dedicated adapter.

settings.aboutDesc: Open-source project information and update settings
settings.generalDesc: Storyboard generation, prompt generation, and download paths
settings.keybindingsDesc: Configure mouse actions, canvas pan, and WASD movement habits

imageHosting.title: Image Hosting
imageHosting.desc: Configure PiXhost or a private image host. Image hosting is used only when enabled.
imageHosting.enableDesc: When off, the configuration is kept but upload and save flows will not use image hosting.
imageHosting.providerDesc: Choose the host to use when image hosting is enabled.

pixhost.title: PiXhost
pixhost.desc: Change the API base URL here when PiXhost rotates domains.

seedvault.title: Private Image Host
seedvault.desc: On save, /tokens is called with email and password, then the returned token overwrites the current token.
seedvault.tokenPlaceholder: Generated after saving credentials, or paste manually
seedvault.tokenHint: After account or password is re-entered, saving refreshes the token.
seedvault.tokenWillRefresh: Account or password changed. Saving will generate a new token.

errors.missingSeedvaultCredentials: Enter the private host account email and password first.
errors.tokenRequestFailed: Failed to fetch private host token. Check the account, password, and API base URL.
errors.invalidTokenResponse: The private host response did not contain a usable token.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save image hosting settings.

canvasInteraction.title: Canvas Operation Habits
canvasInteraction.desc: Configure mouse bindings, box selection, node context menus, and WASD canvas pan.
canvasInteraction.wasdPanDesc: When the canvas has focus and no input is active, W/A/S/D pans the view.

promptManagement.title: Prompt Management
promptManagement.desc: Manage default language and custom overrides for built-in feature prompts.
promptManagement.noPlaceholders: This prompt has no replaceable placeholders, but generation may still attach references or user input.

dynamicNotes.multiAngle: Sliders, camera direction, shot size, consistency constraints, and user extra text are injected during generation.
dynamicNotes.lighting: Light direction, brightness, rim light, color, smart description, and consistency constraints are injected during generation.
dynamicNotes.referenceImage: Generation sends the current node or tool reference images separately; the template does not need image URLs.
dynamicNotes.cameraControl: Camera body, lens, focal length, and aperture values are replaced from the panel selection.
dynamicNotes.panorama: Projection type, common panorama constraints, references, and user input are composed by the panorama flow.
dynamicNotes.directorStudioLayout: Mode instructions, references, placed elements, scene references, and the user's base prompt are generated from Director Studio state.
dynamicNotes.directorStudioScreenshotHandoff: The screenshot is the first connected image; later connected images act as identity, material, or prop references.
dynamicNotes.directorStudioPanoramaImport: The imported image name is dynamic context; this template describes the Director Studio environment-sphere / wraparound-backdrop use, while the panorama flow still composes 2:1/4:1, no-text, no-border, and seamless geometry constraints.
dynamicNotes.storyboardGrid: Rows, columns, frame count, style consistency, no-text directive, and per-frame descriptions are generated by the storyboard node.
dynamicNotes.inpaint: Target content comes from the tool panel, and the mask image is sent as a request parameter.
dynamicNotes.matting: Target subject comes from the tool panel; without a mask, the main foreground subject is used.

promptPresets.title: Prompt Presets
promptPresets.desc: Save reusable custom prompt bodies for later canvas-tool integration.
promptPresets.formHint: Presets store only a name and prompt body, with no language split.
promptPresets.promptPlaceholder: Enter a full prompt or a reusable prompt template

multiAngle.title: Multi-angle
multiAngle.desc: Prompt skeleton used when generating alternate camera angles from a selected image.

lighting.title: Lighting
lighting.desc: Prompt skeleton used when generating lighting adjustments from a selected image.

cameraControlVirtualCamera.title: Camera Control
cameraControlVirtualCamera.desc: Virtual camera, lens, focal length, and aperture text appended to an AI image node.

panoramaSpherical.title: Spherical Panorama Core
panoramaSpherical.desc: Fixed geometry constraints for 2:1 equirectangular panorama generation.

panoramaCylindrical.title: Cylindrical Panorama Core
panoramaCylindrical.desc: Fixed geometry constraints for horizontal 360-degree panorama generation.

panoramaImageFallback.title: Image-to-panorama Wrapper
panoramaImageFallback.desc: Composes reference-image, projection, and user prompt text when converting an image to a panorama.

panoramaTextFallback.title: Text-to-panorama Wrapper
panoramaTextFallback.desc: Composes projection and user prompt text when generating a panorama from text and references.

directorStudioLayout.title: Director Studio Layout
directorStudioLayout.desc: Organizes Director Studio spatial layout, elements, actions, relations, and references into a generation prompt.

directorStudioScreenshotHandoff.title: Director Studio Screenshot Handoff
directorStudioScreenshotHandoff.desc: Explains the roles of the screenshot and linked references when adding a screenshot to canvas.

directorStudioPanoramaImport.title: Director Studio Panorama Import
directorStudioPanoramaImport.desc: Task description appended when converting a selected image into an environment sphere or wraparound background for a 3D Director Studio scene.

storyboardGridGeneration.title: Storyboard Grid Generation
storyboardGridGeneration.desc: Storyboard generation node template for rows, columns, frame descriptions, and toggle directives.

tool_hdSketch.title: Tool · HD Sketch
tool_hdSketch.desc: First HD-tool pass that converts the source image into a structural line sketch.

tool_hdComposite.title: Tool · HD Refinement
tool_hdComposite.desc: Second HD-tool pass that combines the source and sketch for detail refinement.

tool_outpaint_balanced.title: Tool · Outpaint All Sides
tool_outpaint_balanced.desc: Prompt used when extending image boundaries in all directions.

tool_outpaint_horizontal.title: Tool · Horizontal Outpaint
tool_outpaint_horizontal.desc: Prompt used when extending image boundaries left and right.

tool_outpaint_vertical.title: Tool · Vertical Outpaint
tool_outpaint_vertical.desc: Prompt used when extending image boundaries up and down.

tool_inpaint.title: Tool · Inpaint
tool_inpaint.desc: Redraws only the masked region while preserving unmasked areas.

tool_erase.title: Tool · Erase
tool_erase.desc: Prompt used to remove masked objects and reconstruct the background.

tool_matting.title: Tool · Matting
tool_matting.desc: Prompt used to extract the foreground subject and remove the background.

settings.nanoBananaProModelDesc: Switch the Nano Banana Pro endpoint for this provider. If one endpoint fails, try another one. See the <modelListLink>model list</modelListLink> for details.
settings.radiusPresetDesc: Control global corner style for panels, inputs, and nodes.
settings.themeToneDesc: Choose neutral, warm, or cool tint for both light and dark themes.
settings.edgeRoutingModeDesc: Switch edge path style between nodes, including orthogonal routing with automatic node avoidance.
settings.accentColorDesc: Used by buttons, selected borders, and interaction highlights.
settings.downloadPresetPathsDesc: Used by node toolbar download menu for quick-save directories (up to 8).
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistent: Keep storyboard style aligned with references
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistentDesc: When enabled, storyboard generation prompt appends "图片风格与参考图保持一致".
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImage: Disallow descriptive text in storyboard image
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImageDesc: When enabled, storyboard generation prompt appends "禁止添加描述文本".
settings.ignoreAtTagWhenCopyingAndGeneratingDesc: When enabled, copied text and embedded storyboard metadata remove tags like "@图1"; generation requests only remove "@" and keep "图1".
settings.appendParameterConstraintsToPromptDesc: When enabled, generation submits append the current aspect ratio, resolution, and count to the final prompt so models are less likely to ignore them.
settings.collapseNodeActionToolbarByDefaultDesc: When enabled, AI image and image nodes only show a small hint when selected. Click it to expand the toolbar, then click again to collapse it.
settings.showNodePayloadPreviewDesc: When enabled, AI image, AI video, AI audio, and AI text nodes show a request payload preview button in the upper-right corner.
settings.enableAiTextStreamingDesc: Experimental switch only. The current chat transport still returns complete responses, so generation falls back to normal full-response output.
settings.useLegacyPanoramaControlDirectionDesc: Off uses the new reversed drag direction. Turn on to restore the old panorama viewer drag and arrow-key direction.
settings.panoramaControlSensitivityDesc: Adjust drag rotation, arrow-key, and movement speed in the panorama viewer and Panorama Director Studio.
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitle: Use uploaded filename as node title
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitleDesc: When enabled, newly uploaded images use the file name as the node title by default (still editable via double-click).
settings.downloadPathPlaceholder: Input folder path, e.g. /Users/name/Pictures/Storyboard or D:\\Images\\Storyboard
settings.getApiKeyLink: click here to get API key
settings.missingAnyApiKeyMessage: You have not configured any providers yet. Please open Settings to configure one.
settings.aboutIntro: An open-source AI storyboard and Director Studio canvas with panoramas, camera controls, prompt presets, and multi-provider generation.
settings.aboutOriginalAttributionNote: This project is based on the original Storyboard-Copilot project and has the original author's authorization to continue development and publish open source, provided the original author name and project link are retained.
settings.autoCheckUpdateOnLaunchDesc: Check ganbo-gab/open-storyboard-canvas GitHub Releases once every time the app starts.
settings.enableUpdateDialogDesc: Show a custom dialog when a new version is detected.
settings.enableStoryboardGenGridPreviewShortcutDe: When enabled, holding Ctrl + Alt + Shift and clicking Generate on storyboard generation creates a grid preview node without sending AI request.
settings.showStoryboardGenAdvancedRatioControlsDe: When enabled, show cell/overall ratio info and the Overall/Cell mode switch. When disabled, storyboard generation uses cell-ratio mode by default.
settings.storyboardGenAutoInferEmptyFrameDesc: When enabled, empty storyboard cells automatically append "依据之前的内容进行推测" during generation prompt construction.
settings.checkUpdateUpToDate: You are on the latest version.
settings.checkUpdateFailed: Update check failed. Please try again later.

update.dialogDescription: A new version is available. Do you want to download it now?
update.ignoreTodayVersion: Do not remind this version today
